title: Shield the origin from cache misses
description: Use origin shielding and request coalescing so a cold or purged cache does not stampede the origin.
body: Use when origin load spikes on cache misses or after a purge. Do not let every edge PoP fetch from origin independently — a purge or cold start then multiplies origin requests. Actions: enable origin shield / tiered caching so one mid-tier fetches on behalf of many PoPs, and rely on request coalescing for concurrent misses on the same key. Validation signals include origin request rate staying flat during a purge and a measured reduction in origin fetches. Risk boundary: an unshielded purge of a hot key can overload the origin — schedule mass purges carefully or use soft-purge.
